hint: The unique Petroleum Development Oman assigned identifier for each well. This is the PRIMARY JOIN KE
Do NOT use for rig codes like NL0010 - those are in Revenue.rigcode
This is RIG CODE, not location. Do NOT search in well_location for NL0010!
The planned progress target. CRITICAL: This is NVARCHAR (text) type - must CAST to DECIMAL before co
CRITICAL: The planned monetary target. This is NVARCHAR (text) - must CAST to DECIMAL before SUM!
CRITICAL: Use this for spud/tie-in queries - this is when rig arrived at well. DO NOT use actual_start_date for rig-related date calculations!
This is generic work start date - for rig arrival dates use actual_rig_on_date instead
Date location was pegged - use with actual_rig_on_date for Location Pegged to Spud KPI (Target: >140 days)
Site Change Request date - use with actual_rig_on_date for Stable Rig Sequence KPI (Target: >90 days)
Date FLAF was issued - use with actual_rig_on_date for FLAF to Spud KPI (Target: >90 days)
Date site survey report was issued - use with flaf_issue_date for Survey Report from FLAF KPI (Target: <15 days)
Commissioning finish date - use with actual_rig_off_date for Overall Commissioning Duration KPI (Target: <5 days with Rig/FBU/RSR, <15 days with Hoist)
